title: Google Pixel 11 Pro XL: Pricing and Specs Leaks Emerge
description: Recent reports from Forbes, Droid Life, and Android Authority discuss potential release dates, pricing advantages over competitors, and detailed specifications for the Google Pixel 11 Pro XL.

sources.title: Pixel 11 Release Date: Price Reveal Hands Advantage To iPhone 17
Pixel 11 Series Specs: Storage, RAM, Displays, Battery, More
More deleted Pixel 11 Amazon listings reveal full US pricing and specs

sections.heading: Pricing and Release Information
paragraphs: Forbes published an article titled 'Pixel 11 Release Date: Price Reveal Hands Advantage To iPhone 17,' discussing the device's release date and price comparison. Additionally, Android Authority reported on deleted Amazon listings that revealed full US pricing and specifications.

sections.heading: Device Specifications
paragraphs: Droid Life covered the Pixel 11 series specs, including details on storage, RAM, displays, and battery. Android Authority also noted that the deleted Amazon listings provided information on the device's specifications.

sections.heading: Search Interest
paragraphs: The term 'google pixel 11 pro xl' has a reported search lower bound of 5000 in the GB region. This data was captured on July 20, 2026, following a trend feed update on July 19, 2026.

faq.q: What sources have reported on the Google Pixel 11 Pro XL?
faq.a: Forbes, Droid Life, and Android Authority have published articles regarding the device's release date, pricing, and specifications.

faq.q: What specific details were revealed in the leaks?
faq.a: According to Droid Life, details include storage, RAM, displays, and battery. Android Authority reported on full US pricing and specs found in deleted Amazon listings.

faq.q: How does the pricing compare to competitors?
faq.a: Forbes reported that the price reveal hands an advantage to the iPhone 17.
